message:
feat(fnp-python): native Rust sum implementation + conformance harness

Port numpy.sum from passthrough to native Rust via fnp-ufunc
UFuncArray::reduce_sum. Falls back to NumPy for dtype conversion,
out buffer, initial, or where parameters.

Adds conformance_sum.rs with 106+ test cases across 7 test functions:
- 50 flat reduction cases
- 20 2D axis reduction cases
- 12 3D axis reduction cases
- 8 keepdims shape cases
- 8 integer dtype cases
- 5 NaN handling cases
- 2 empty array cases

All tests verify Rust sum matches NumPy oracle within tolerance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
